metadata.title: youin — visual feedback, on the live web
metadata.description: Click any element on any live site. Mark a comment. Ship a ticket. Without leaving the browser.

notFound.asideNote: * Request matched no live route or document. Assets and deep links drift when URLs change between releases — return to dashboard or homepage to continue.
notFound.title: This route has no landing yet.
notFound.body: The URL might be mistyped, the page may have moved, or the link could be stale. Pick up from a known workspace surface and keep reviewing where your team actually ships work.
notFound.footer: youin — feedback on the live web

authShell.headline: Review faster. Ship cleaner.
authShell.lead: Sign in to route live feedback into tickets with context attached. Your reviewer stays on the page, your developer opens a complete brief.
authShell.bullet1: Built for agencies and product teams working on live pages.
authShell.bullet2: One accent color, one source of truth, one workflow.
authShell.bullet3: Less QA theater. More resolved decisions.

routeError.title: We couldn't finish loading this page.
routeError.body: The error has been logged. Try again — most failures here are transient (network blips, a slow query). If it keeps happening, head back to the dashboard and reopen the page.

bootstrap.title: Failed to load workspace
bootstrap.bodyFallback: Please try again or reload the page.

hero.title: Your to-do list lives on your app.
hero.subtitle: Click any element. Write what needs to change. Push it as a Linear, GitHub, or Jira ticket — all without leaving your live app. No spreadsheets. No Slack chains.
hero.metaLine: Chrome extension · npm dev dep · Linear · GitHub · Jira

problem.title: Five steps for a five-second observation.
problem.p1: Designers and PMs lose context while moving across tools. Developers receive summaries instead of the moment that triggered the feedback.
problem.oldLoopBody: Screenshot → annotate → paste in chat → explain context → wait for questions → repeat.
problem.withBody: Click → comment → done. Context is captured, the ticket writes itself.

steps.title: Mark an element
steps.body: Click anything on your app from the Chrome extension or the npm dev dep. Selector, viewport, browser, and screenshot are captured automatically.

steps.title: Comment with context
steps.body: Write only the intent. URL, device details, and element reference are already attached for whoever picks it up.

steps.title: Ship a ready ticket
steps.body: Push to Linear, GitHub, or Jira. The issue arrives with repro details, screenshot, and discussion thread pre-filled.

who.title: Built for people who notice first.

personas.body: Designers, PMs, and devs annotating the same live surface. Replaces scattered Slack threads and Linear backlogs you keep meaning to clean up.
Install youin as an npm dev dep. Treat your own app as a spatial to-do list — the fix lives where the bug lives.
Multi-client review at scale. Guest links keep clients in your app, not in their inbox.

pricing.title: Paid from day one.
pricing.subtitle: No free tier. Either the product earns its keep on day one, or it doesn't.

tiers.name: Solo
tiers.blurb: For indie devs who think in pages.

install.title: Stop describing the thing you can point at.
install.subtitle: The next time someone spots a live issue, leave a mark instead of a message thread.

popup.continueGoogleAria: Continue with Google in a new tab

widget.spaceCreated: Created. Select it in the list.
widget.createSpaceError: Could not create in your workspace—try signing in via the popup first.

sync.noWorkspace: No workspace found for this user. Use the web app once to finish setup.
sync.noSpaces: No spaces in your workspace yet. Create one in the web app, then reopen the popup.
sync.markNeedsTitle: Mark needs a title before sync.
sync.spaceLocal: Space is still local-only. Reload the popup after signing in to sync workspaces.
sync.noWorkspaceAccount: No workspace for this account. Open youin once in the browser.
sync.createSpaceFailed: Could not create space (name may already exist).

migrate.noWorkspace: No workspace found for this user. Open the web app once to set one up.
